headline: Best Buy CEO drops major consumer warning on her way out
summary: As we head into summer, Americans are spending more money than ever. But they don’t seem to feel very good about it. In April 2026, consumer spending rose by $111 billion, according to the Bureau of Economic Analysis. But confidence in the economy hit two-year lows, with 65% of consumers telling ...

headline: Best Buy bets big on controversial partner
summary: It wasn’t all that long ago that smart glasses and VR headsets felt like something straight out of an episode of an episode “The Jetsons” or a science fiction novel, not something you could find on store shelves. Now, not only can you buy these wearable computers, but you can actually try them on ...
